title: createConfigurationResponse
description: Schema for createConfigurationResponse in Nuix ECC REST API

id.description: id of the new Collection Configuration

name.description: name of the new Collection Configuration

description.description: description of the new Collection Configuration

template.description: template of the new Collection Configuration

category.description: Optional category of the new Collection Configuration

targets.description: Array of targets specified in this Collection Configuration

hasInputs.description: whether any input paths are specified within any of the Targets or Computers in this Collection Configuration

tasks.description: Array of tasks specified in this Collection Configuration
